summary: B1 schema: added assigneeKind('agent'|'human', default 'agent') + nullable completedBy actor handle to todo-store (DDL + migration backfill, create/update/complete/import), threaded through add/update_session_todo (functions, schemas, registry + setup.ts switch) and ui sessionTodo.ts mirror. Human completion auto-stamps local:<host>; explicit completedBy honored; cleared on un-complete/reject. Gate: tsc clean (12 pre-existing errors confirmed unrelated via stash baseline), 57 todo-store tests pass incl 6 new B1 tests. Used repo-root project arg to bypass the worktree todos.db resolution bug (escalation 662af585 et al).
